title: Preparation of LB Media
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pdhmi6
materials: Weigh 25 g of Luria Broth Base powder. Luria Broth Base (Miller's LB Broth Base)™, powder Thermo Fisher Catalog #12795027
Autoclave entire bottle of LB media.

steps.title: Add the powder into 1 L of water
steps.instruction: Add the powder into 1 L of water. Water refers to sterilized deionized water Contributed by users
